input.command:
git add plugins/dev-department/src/ui/components/ConversationRefs.tsx && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Fix errors in ConversationRefs.tsx

- Rename RefRow prop from ref to conversationRef (ref is reserved in React)
- Import ConversationSystem, ConversationRole, ScopeType from types instead of re-declaring locally
- Change scopeType prop type from string to ScopeType
- Use dynamic id auth-add-${scopeId} on checkbox instead of hardcoded auth-add
- Add URL validation in handleAdd to reject non-http(s) URLs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

content.text:
All 5 changes applied and committed:

1. `ref` → `conversationRef` in `RefRow` props
2. Removed local type re-declarations; imports `ConversationSystem`, `ConversationRole`, `ScopeType` from `../../worker/types`
3. `scopeType: string` → `scopeType: ScopeType`
4. Checkbox `id` changed from `"auth-add"` to `` `auth-add-${scopeId}` `` (label `htmlFor` updated too)
5. `handleAdd` rejects URLs not starting with `https://` or `http://`

result:
All 5 changes applied and committed:

1. `ref` → `conversationRef` in `RefRow` props
2. Removed local type re-declarations; imports `ConversationSystem`, `ConversationRole`, `ScopeType` from `../../worker/types`
3. `scopeType: string` → `scopeType: ScopeType`
4. Checkbox `id` changed from `"auth-add"` to `` `auth-add-${scopeId}` `` (label `htmlFor` updated too)
5. `handleAdd` rejects URLs not starting with `https://` or `http://`
